description: A slogan graphic built around a stock photograph: two people embracing in a hug, in what appears to be an airport terminal (blurred travelers and concourse lighting in the background). One person wears a denim jacket and a small backpack and has a face mask pulled down; the other wears a light-colored sweater. Overlaid white text in the lower-left reads 'If you self-deport now, you MAY be able to return as an immigrant or visitor someday' (with 'MAY' in larger type), followed by a large headline 'the LEGAL way' where the word 'LEGAL' is in bold green and 'the' and 'way' are white. Across the bottom is a dark blue banner bearing the round DHS/ICE seal and the 'ICE' wordmark on the left, with a vertical divider and the line 'Learn more at: ICE.gov/self-deportation' on the right.
notable_text: If you self-deport now, you MAY be able to return as an immigrant or visitor someday - the LEGAL way; Learn more at: ICE.gov/self-deportation
